message: Node started: Define a function w(m) as the Hamming weight (the number of set bits) of an integer m in its binary representation. Given a fixed positive integer constant C, find the minimum value of w(C * n) for all positive integers n. This is equivalent to finding the minimum Hamming weight among all positive multiples of C. The problem requires analyzing the properties of the multiplier C in relation to powers of two to determine the smallest possible number of bits required to represent a multiple of C.
